query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_invitations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('user', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  teamRole ENUM('admin', 'lead_manager', 'acquisition_manager') DEFAULT 'lead_manager' NOT NULL,
  invitedBy INT,
  inviteToken VARCHAR(64),
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'expired', 'revoked') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  acceptedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  acceptedByUserId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (tenantId) REFERENCES tenants(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (invitedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (acceptedByUserId) REFERENCES users(id)
);

  FOREIGN KEY (invitedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (acceptedByUserId) REFERENCES users(id)
);
